name: MALIGNANT EXTERNAL OTITIS
definition: NECROTIZING EXTERNAL OTITIS severe bacterial infection of the soft tissues + bones at base of skull
dominant_finding: soft-tissue density in external auditory canal (100%)
discriminating_features: osseous erosion of external auditory canal
soft-tissue density in external auditory canal (100%)
fluid in middle ear / mastoid air cells (89%)
obliteration of fat planes beneath temporal bone (64%)

general: osseous erosion of external auditory canal
CT: soft-tissue density in external auditory canal (100%)
fluid in middle ear / mastoid air cells (89%)
obliteration of fat planes beneath temporal bone (64%)
abnormal signal intensity + obliteration of fat within stylomastoid foramen

clinical.Cx: bone destruction; skull base osteomyelitis (clivus, jugular foramen); abscess of epidural
